messages.content: 帮我翻译为英文：徐汇区南宁路536号

英文可译为：

**No. 536, Nanning Road, Xuhui District**
翻译：我申请NTU-SJTU Joint PhD Programme, Prof. Xingang Pan是我在项目申请时联系的外方导师，潘教授已同意接受我为joint PhD
I am applying for the NTU–SJTU Joint PhD Programme. Prof. Xingang Pan is the overseas supervisor I contacted during my application, and Professor Pan has agreed to accept me as a joint PhD student.
翻译：我目前的的研究聚焦于2D AIGC，在此之前，我从事Computer Vision和AI for Science的研究。截至目前，我已经发表了11篇论文，其中6篇为第一作者或共同第一作者，7篇已经被国际顶尖的学术会议或期刊所接受（CVPR，NeurIPS，ICLR，ICCV等）。具体的论文发表情况请见所附文件

My current research focuses on 2D AIGC. Previously, I worked on research in Computer Vision and AI for Science. To date, I have published 11 papers, including 6 as first author or co-first author, and 7 have been accepted by top-tier international conferences or journals (e.g., CVPR, NeurIPS, ICLR, ICCV). Please refer to the attached file for details of my publications.

I am applying for the NTU–SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme. Prof. Xingang Pan is the NTU supervisor I contacted during my application, and he has agreed to accept me as a joint PhD student. 前边加一句：Prof. Xingang Pan是一位在2D AIGC领域有极高造诣的知名学者，我的研究方向和他的非常契合，我希望能从他这里获得指导

Prof. Xingang Pan is a renowned scholar with extensive expertise in 2D AIGC. My research interests align closely with his, and I hope to receive his guidance. I am applying for the NTU–SJTU Joint PhD Degree Programme. Prof. Xingang Pan is the NTU supervisor I contacted during my application, and he has agreed to accept me as a joint PhD student.
and I hope to receive his guidance. 这句话改成希望获得有价值的guidance，做出有影响力的科研
… and I hope to receive his valuable guidance to conduct impactful research.
